section_analysis.description: Daily life narrative. Piano-led gentle rock. Focused on 'Maegami' (Bangs) motif.
Grand anthem-style explosion. 'Melt' hook. High emotional release.

lyrics.original: メルト 溶けてしまいそう
お願い 時間を止めて 泣きそうなの
lyrics.romaji: Onegai jikan wo tomete nakisou nano
lyrics.meta: Core emotional plea. Innocent and intense.

stylistic_dna.main_instrument: Grand Piano, Electric Guitar, Driving Drums
signature_phrases: 好きだなんて絶対に言えない (Can absolutely not say I like you)
